ddls:
CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* Full URL visited */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the URL */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path of the URL */,
  "query" TEXT /* Query parameters of the URL */,
  "fragment" TEXT /* Fragment of the URL */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the web page */,
  "description" TEXT /* Meta description of the web page */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Meta keywords of the web page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date the user was last active */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transitions" (
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transition type */,
  "transition_name" TEXT /* Name of the transition type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transition type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the session start */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the session end */,
  "number_of_visits" INTEGER /* Number of visits in the session */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the session in milliseconds */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate of the session */,
  "average_time_on_page" REAL /* Average time spent on each page */,
  "exit_page" TEXT /* Last page visited in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_visits" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id", "visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_behavior" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits by the user */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of all visits by the user in milliseconds */,
  "average_visit_duration" REAL /* Average duration of visits by the user in milliseconds */,
  "most_visited_url_id" INTEGER /* ID of the most visited URL by the user */,
  "average_pages_per_session" REAL /* Average number of pages visited per session */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate of the user */,
  "exit_page" TEXT /* Last page visited by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_behavior_most_visited_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("most_visited_url_id") REFERENCES urls ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_segments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "url_segments" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the URL */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id", "segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* Notification settings */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* Privacy settings */,
  "dismissed_cookie_notification" INTEGER /* Cookie notification dismissal status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "privacy_settings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "cookie_usage" INTEGER /* Cookie usage consent status */,
  "data_sharing" INTEGER /* Data sharing consent status */,
  "location_sharing" INTEGER /* Location sharing consent status */,
  "ad_personalization" INTEGER /* Ad personalization consent status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the export */,
  "export_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the export request */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
